response.justification: While this candidate demonstrates strong technical depth across 15+ years of development and has relevant experience building developer tools and infrastructure, the resume provides no evidence of people management or team leadership experience. The role requires 2 years of people management and explicit people-leadership responsibilities including conducting 1-on-1s, performance reviews, and team development. The candidate's background shows only individual contributor positions with 'Staff' titles and no mention of managing direct reports, developing team members, or organizational leadership.
strengths: 15+ years of software development across diverse technologies and platforms
Directly relevant developer tools experience including IDE components, CI/CD infrastructure, and MCP code generators
Strong open-source project ownership and community leadership through workshops and public technical initiatives
concerns: No demonstrated people management or direct report experience—a core requirement for a people-leadership role
All roles are individual contributor positions with 'Staff' titles; no mention of managing teams, conducting reviews, or developing reports
Limited mobile platform ecosystem knowledge; mobile experience limited to one 1-year iOS role, not a focus area
